content: Level: Level 1 | Field Name: scene | Field Value: laboratory verification | Result: Select only from "Amplification"
Level: Level 1 | Field Name: scene | Field Value: dsRNA pesticide design | Result: Select only from "HIGS", "Microbial expression", "Nanocarrier"
Level: Level 1 | Field Name: scene | Field Value: field application | Result: Select only from "HIGS", "Microbial expression", "Nanocarrier"
Level: Level 2 | Field Name: host plant transgenic | Field Value: yes | Result: Prefer "HIGS"
Level: Level 2 | Field Name: host plant transgenic | Field Value: no | Result: Cannot choose "HIGS"
Level: Level 2 | Field Name: nanocarrier | Field Value: yes | Result: Prefer "Nanocarrier"
Level: Level 2 | Field Name: nanocarrier | Field Value: no | Result: Cannot choose "Nanocarrier"
Level: Level 3 | Field Name: biocontrol bacteria | Field Value: yes | Result: Prefer "Microbial expression"-"Biocontrol bacteria"
Level: Level 3 | Field Name: biocontrol bacteria | Field Value: no | Result: Cannot choose "Microbial expression"-"Biocontrol bacteria"
Level: Level 3 | Field Name: insect symbiotic bacteria | Field Value: yes | Result: Prefer "Microbial expression"-"Insect symbiotic bacteria"
Level: Level 3 | Field Name: insect symbiotic bacteria | Field Value: no | Result: Cannot choose "Microbial expression"-"Insect symbiotic bacteria"
Level: Level 3 | Field Name: insect virus | Field Value: yes | Result: Prefer "Microbial expression"-"Insect virus"
Level: Level 3 | Field Name: insect virus | Field Value: no | Result: Cannot choose "Microbial expression"-"Insect virus"
Level: Level 4 | Field Name: stage | Field Value: egg | Result: Prefer "Feed", "Injection"
Level: Level 4 | Field Name: stage | Field Value: larva | Result: Prefer "Injection", "Soak" or "Nanocarrier"-"Natural nanomaterials"-"Chitosan NPs" or "Organic synthetic nanomaterials"- "Liposomes"
Level: Level 4 | Field Name: stage | Field Value: pupa | Result: Prefer "Injection"
Level: Level 4 | Field Name: stage | Field Value: adult | Result: Prefer "Feed", "Injection", "Topical application" or "Nanocarrier"
Level: Level 4 | Field Name: mouthparts | Field Value: chewling or sponging | Result: Prefer "Injection" or "Microbial expression" or "Nanocarrier"
Level: Level 4 | Field Name: mouthparts | Field Value: piercing-sucking | Result: Prefer "Feed", "Injection" or "HIGS" or "Nanocarrier"
Level: Level 4 | Field Name: feeding structures | Field Value: leaf | Result: Prefer "Injection" or "Microbial expression" or "Nanocarrier"
Level: Level 4 | Field Name: feeding structures | Field Value: phloem | Result: Prefer "Feed", "Injection" or "HIGS" or "Nanocarrier"

Level: Level 4 | Field Name: feeding structures | Field Value: root | Result: Prefer "Injection", "Soak", "Topical application" or "Microbial expression"-"Biocontrol bacteria"-"Rhizosphere microbes" or "Nanocarrier"-"Natural nanomaterials"-"Clay NPs"
Level: Level 4 | Field Name: feeding structures | Field Value: internal tissue | Result: Prefer "Feed" or "HIGS"

Level: Level 5 | Field Name: tempture | Field Value: high | Result: Prefer "Biocontrol bacteria"-"Colonizable engineered bacteria". Cannot choose "Liposomes", when using "Nanocarrier", choose "Inorganic nanomaterials"-"SiNPs"
Level: Level 5 | Field Name: tempture | Field Value: middle | Result: No bias
Level: Level 5 | Field Name: tempture | Field Value: low | Result: Cannot choose "Liposomes"
Level: Level 5 | Field Name: light | Field Value: high | Result: Prefer "Nanocarrier"-"Inorganic nanomaterials"-"SiNPs"/"LDH"
Level: Level 5 | Field Name: light | Field Value: middle | Result: No bias
Level: Level 5 | Field Name: light | Field Value: low | Result: No bias
Level: Level 5 | Field Name: humidity | Field Value: high | Result: Prefer "Nanocarrier"-"Natural nanomaterials"
Level: Level 5 | Field Name: humidity | Field Value: middle | Result: No bias
Level: Level 5 | Field Name: humidity | Field Value: low | Result: Prefer "HIGS"-"Endogenous expression in host plants"
